description: Noir app repository for eSign/AltStore-style clients.

apps.name: Noir
apps.subtitle: Modular media player
apps.localizedDescription: Noir modular media player with external services.
apps.versionDescription: Fix sustained Miruro segment handling under continuous playback by filtering definite non-media injected URIs (e.g., .webp) while preserving valid obfuscated media segment URIs (e.g., .gif), verified with a 2-minute continuous segment watch.

versions.localizedDescription: Fix sustained Miruro segment handling under continuous playback by filtering definite non-media injected URIs (e.g., .webp) while preserving valid obfuscated media segment URIs (e.g., .gif), verified with a 2-minute continuous segment watch.
